description: You are an environmental robotics engineer configuring a sensor pod designed to be air-dropped from a UAV. A simulation world is loaded with the pod at 100m altitude, but its physics and sensors are misconfigured, causing it to free-fall and fail to collect data. Configure the SENSOR_POD robot by setting its mass to 3.2 kg and adding a Damping node with linear damping of 0.95 and angular damping of 0.60. Update the ALTIMETER DistanceSensor to be a 'laser' type with a maxRange of 150.0 and a rotation of '0 1 0 -1.5708'. Additionally, add a Receiver node named 'abort_receiver' on channel 7 to the pod's children. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/airdrop_configured.wbt.
